title: Finance Tracker: local household expense tracking inside Home Assistant
body:
Hi everyone,

I have been building **Finance Tracker**, a local-first Home Assistant custom integration for household expense tracking.

It adds a dedicated **Finance** sidebar panel where you can:

- Maintain recurring and one-time expense definitions
- Bulk import expenses from CSV/XLSX
- Generate a yearly plan from active expenses
- Review and activate the year plan
- Track the current month with unpaid items above paid items
- Record full or partial payments
- Review yearly history, categories, and payment transactions
- Export CSV snapshots for expenses, current month, and history
- Configure reminder notifications through Home Assistant notify services

The main goal is simple: keep household finance planning inside Home Assistant without sending finance data to an external cloud service. Data is stored locally in `config/finance/tracker.db`.

## Install

Install as a HACS custom repository:

```text
https://github.com/himanshutak08/financeTracker
```

Category: **Integration**

After installation:

1. Restart Home Assistant.
2. Go to **Settings → Devices & services → Add integration**.
3. Search for **Finance Tracker**.
4. Open **Finance** from the sidebar.

## First-use flow

1. Add expenses manually or use Bulk Import.
2. Open Year Setup.
3. Generate the year.
4. Review the draft.
5. Activate the year.
6. Open Current Month and start recording payments.

## Screenshots

Screenshots/GIFs to add before posting:

- Current Month ledger
- Add Expense catalog
- Bulk Import flow
- Year Setup draft/activate flow
- History reports
- Settings/reminders
- Mobile view with sidebar hamburger

## Feedback wanted

I would especially appreciate testing/feedback around:

- HACS installation and updates
- CSV/XLSX import behavior
- Mobile app layout
- Reminder notifications
- Missing recurrence patterns
- Export/reporting needs

Known limitation: this is not a bank sync integration. It is intended for manual/local household expense planning.

GitHub: https://github.com/himanshutak08/financeTracker
